Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica A. Nudelman, Esq. of the Law Offices of John A. Hauser, T:714.674.1378, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
Rett D. B. Bermark, Esq. of the Barnes Firm, T:800.800.0000, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS NATALIE TONDELLI-WALSH, TOP DOG PET CARE, LLC(DBA TOP DOG SF), SERENA GALLEGOS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT as follows:

Defendants Top Dog Pet Care LLC, Natalie Tondelli-Walsh and Serena Gallegos' motion to strike Plaintiff Fred Larsen's prayer for punitive damages in the complaint is granted without leave to amend.
